results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board | Al Jazeera
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end

summary: On April 29, 2026, the FOMC held the federal funds rate at 3.50-3.75% (third consecutive hold). Unusual 8-4 split: one dissenter (Miran) wanted a cut; three wanted to hold without easing bias. Powell stated he will remain on the Fed board despite Trump legal pressure. Easing bias retained.
